state.name: New York
state.dotFullName: New York State Department of Transportation

columnMapping._description: Maps NYSDOT Motor Vehicle Crashes (Socrata e8ky-4vqe) to CRASH LENS field codes
columnMapping._note: 18 columns available. CRITICAL LIMITATION: NO latitude/longitude fields and NO crash ID field. Dataset is aggregate crash-level with county, date, and descriptors only.

derivedFields._description: Fields that must be computed from raw data during Stage 1 (CONVERT)

SEVERITY._note: NY provides crash_descriptor as text (e.g., 'Fatal Collision', 'Injury Collision', 'Property Damage Collision'). Map to KABCO. Also number_of_persons_killed/injured available for validation.

NODE._note: No route/road name or intersection fields. Location-based analysis requires geocoding from county only.

_LIMITATION._note: This dataset lacks lat/lon coordinates. Map-based visualization and hotspot analysis are NOT possible with this dataset alone. Consider supplementing with NYSDOT's GIS crash data if available.

roadSystems._description: New York road classification for road-type filtering

crashTypeMapping._description: Maps New York collision type values to CRASH LENS standard
crashTypeMapping._note: Update with actual state values from data dictionary

dataSource.name: NYSDOT Open Data Portal
dataSource.dataDictionary: See data.ny.gov dataset e8ky-4vqe metadata. LIMITATION: No lat/lon or crash ID. 18 columns with county-level crash descriptors.
